name: Sarah
history: Sarah is in a long-term relationship with Amelia. Amelia has a demanding professional schedule. Sarah feels isolated during the week. Sarah does most household tasks and does not discuss resentment with Amelia. History includes childhood separations from parents associated with distress.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: I should be able to handle everything on my own.
intermediate_belief_depression: If I can't manage everything perfectly, I am failing.
coping_strategies: Avoids discussing feelings of resentment with Amelia and tries to manage everything herself.
situation: Doing laundry and thinking about the future of the relationship and her domestic role.
auto_thought: Why is it me? Why not ask somebody else?
behavior: Avoids confrontation and internalizes feelings of inadequacy.
